title: centaurium oxyphyllum
intro: Centaurium oxyphyllum, also known as mountain centaury, is a perennial plant species in the gentian family (Gentianaceae), native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of centaurium oxyphyllum include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. Centaurium oxyphyllum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
